user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new thought of the day, so that employees see motivational content on their dashboard
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Thought of the day screen; When I click Add new thought and enter the text and save; Then the thought is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the thought of the day feature, so that I control whether it is shown to employees
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Thought of the day screen; When I answer whether I support thought of the day and save; Then the feature is enabled or disabled accordingly

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to choose the publish type such as Sequential, so that thoughts are displayed in the desired order
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring thoughts; When I select a Publish type and save; Then thoughts are published using that order

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to select the text color and set a default text, so that the display is styled and never empty
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Thought of the day screen; When I choose a text color and enter default text and save; Then the styling and fallback text are applied

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit or delete existing thoughts, so that outdated or incorrect entries are removed
acceptance_criteria: Given thoughts are listed; When I edit or delete a thought; Then the change is saved and reflected in the list
